name: private-safe

scripts.check:all: pnpm check:fees && pnpm check:audit && pnpm check:csp
scripts.verify: pnpm check:fees && pnpm typecheck && pnpm check:audit

_comment_pnpm: pnpm 11+ ignores this field — the authoritative overrides live in pnpm-workspace.yaml. Kept here only as a fallback for older pnpm.
